title: Your AI Stack & Mastermind Prep
plainEnglishSummary: Consolidate what you learned — chat, workflows, automation, agents — and what to bring to session with Kai.

reading.script:
Final prep week — let's consolidate everything into a stack you can actually run, and what to bring to our mastermind session.

Your stack in order. Layer one — a chat sidekick, ChatGPT or Claude, for daily drafts. Layer two — prompt templates plus documented weekly workflows. Layer three — no-code automation like Zapier or Make for repeat triggers. Layer four — agents, voice, custom tools only where pilots proved ROI. Don't skip to layer four because it sounds cool.

What to bring to mastermind. Your top two workflows: time spent today, target time with AI, where you're stuck. One win and one failure — both teach more than theory. Your ninety-day priority: one project only, not ten. And questions from this FAQ week that need live debate.

You've built the foundation. Now we make it real in your business. Activity time.

sections.heading: Your stack in order
paragraphs: Layer 1 — Chat sidekick (ChatGPT or Claude) for daily drafts.
Layer 2 — Prompt templates + documented weekly workflows.
Layer 3 — No-code automation (Zapier/Make) for repeat triggers.
Layer 4 — Agents / voice / custom tools only where pilots proved ROI.

sections.heading: What to bring to mastermind
paragraphs: Top 2 workflows: time spent today, target time with AI, where you're stuck.
One win and one failure — both teach more than theory.
Your 90-day priority: one project only. Not ten.
Questions from this FAQ week that need live debate.

discussPrompts: What's one thing you'll stop doing manually?

steps.question: Which layer are you on today? (Chat only, workflows, automation, or agents)
steps.placeholder: e.g. Daily ChatGPT for email — no automation yet

steps.question: Workflow #1 for mastermind: what is it, how long does it take, where are you stuck?
steps.placeholder: e.g. Lead follow-up — 2 hrs/week — stuck on personalization

steps.question: One AI win from the last 12 weeks (even small):
steps.placeholder: e.g. Meeting notes to team email saves 35 min/week

steps.question: One AI mistake or lesson learned:
steps.placeholder: e.g. Published a stat without verifying — now I always check

steps.question: Your single 90-day AI priority (one sentence):
steps.placeholder: e.g. Automate post-demo follow-up with AI draft + human send

steps.question: One question you want answered live in mastermind:
steps.placeholder: e.g. Is voice AI ready for my inbound leads?

takeaway: Chat → workflows → automation → agents. One 90-day priority. Bring real workflows to Kai.
